tasks.title: Add task labeling and custom field support
evidence: Tasks have fixed schema: id, status, title, tags, scope, evidence, plan, notes, request, agent, timestamps
No way to attach custom metadata
Teams using Ralph for project management may want custom fields
plan: Add custom_fields: HashMap<String, String> to Task
Update validation to allow arbitrary custom fields
Update queue show to display custom fields
Add queue set-field <task-id> <key> <value> command
Add tests for custom field persistence and retrieval

tasks.title: Add environment variable interpolation in prompts
evidence: Prompts are static; cannot reference env vars or config values
No way to customize prompts with project-specific values
Templates like "API endpoint: ${API_URL}" would be useful
plan: Add env var interpolation to prompt rendering (e.g., ${VAR:-default})
Add config value interpolation (e.g., {{agent.runner}})
Support escaping with $${VAR} or \\${VAR}
Document supported variables in prompt override docs
Add tests for interpolation edge cases

tasks.title: Add task validation rules and custom schemas
evidence: Validation is hardcoded; teams cannot add custom rules
Cannot enforce project-specific constraints like "all tasks must have 'estimate'"
No way to require certain tags or forbid others
plan: Add validation_rules to Config (required_fields, required_tags, forbidden_tags)
Extend queue validation to check custom rules
Add ralph queue test-rules command to validate against config
Support rule inheritance from global to project config
Add tests for custom validation rules

tasks.title: Implement task lifecycle hooks and triggers
evidence: No way to run custom scripts on task state transitions
Cannot trigger notifications or external actions when tasks complete
Automation requires manual intervention after each task
plan: Add hooks.on_task_start, hooks.on_task_complete, hooks.on_task_fail to Config
Define hooks as command lists to execute
Run hooks in run_cmd at appropriate lifecycle points
Pass task context as env vars (RALPH_TASK_ID, RALPH_STATUS, etc.)
Add hook validation to prevent infinite loops or dangerous commands
Add tests for hook execution and error handling

tasks.title: Add color output support and terminal detection
evidence: No global --color flag or NO_COLOR env var support
Colored output in doctor_cmd doesn't respect terminal capabilities
Cannot disable color for CI/CD environments
plan: Add --color flag (auto, always, never) to CLI
Respect NO_COLOR and TERM=dumb environment variables
Update colored crate usage to check terminal support
Add outpututil::should_use_color() helper
Add tests for color output in different TERM settings

tasks.title: Implement task progress tracking and checkpointing
evidence: Long-running tasks provide no intermediate progress updates
No way for agents to report "50% complete"
Cannot resume from checkpoints within a task
plan: Add progress field to Task (percentage, current_step, total_steps)
Add queue set-progress <task-id> <percentage> command
Agents can update progress via special comments or RPC
Display progress bar in run loop output
Add tests for progress tracking and display

tasks.title: Add task comments and discussion threads
evidence: Task notes are flat; no threaded discussions
Cannot have conversations within a task about approach
Notes don't track who said what and when
plan: Add comments field to Task (list of structured comment objects)
Each comment has author, timestamp, and content
Add queue comment <task-id> <message> command
Add queue show-comments <task-id> command
Support thread replies with --reply-to=<comment-id>
Add tests for comment threading

tasks.title: Implement task pinning for important items
evidence: Important tasks can be accidentally reordered or modified
No way to "protect" critical tasks from changes
Pinned tasks should resist auto-sorting or bulk operations
plan: Add pinned field to Task (boolean, default false)
Add queue pin/unpin <task-id> commands
Update queue list to show pinned indicator (* or 📌)
Skip pinned tasks during auto-sort operations
Require --force to edit pinned tasks
Add tests for pin protection behavior
